detectors.description:
STOS.burnTokenCheck(address,address,uint256) (STOS.sol#1483-1511) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- _safeOwner = recipient (STOS.sol#1485)

		STOS.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])
		STOS.transfer(address,uint256)
		STOS._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)
